rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes when they refer to visible ports and features.
Use visible identifiers from the AADL model to define assumptions and guarantees.
generic_rules: Use explicit type declarations in AGREE to match AADL data types.
Avoid encoding AADL properties as AGREE variables unless explicitly exposed as ports or constants.
Generate range assumptions using visible feature names and concrete bounds.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};`.
Assumptions and guarantees must reference valid visible identifiers in scope.
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type contracts.
Do not convert Boolean domain values into integers unless the port is explicitly typed as bool.
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing parameters
Implementation-level bindings and subcomponent port usage
